error_signature: n8n version remains unchanged after upgrade
title: n8n version not updating due to volume mount
symptom: After upgrading the n8n Docker image, the version remains at 1.73.1 despite pulling the latest image. Checking the version inside the container also shows the old version.
applies_when: Upgrading to a new image version
not_this_if: No volume mounts are configured in docker-compose.yml
root_cause: The issue arises when the `node_modules` directory is mounted as a volume in the `docker-compose.yml` file. This prevents the new version of n8n from being properly installed, as the mounted volume retains the old version's files.
fix_steps: Locate the volume mount for node_modules
Remove the volume mount for node_modules
Re-run 'docker compose down' and 'docker compose up -d'
agent_instruction: Remove the volume mount for node_modules in your docker-compose.yml and restart the n8n service.
